titleStmt.title: SII 23.375: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 375. (A.R. No. 375 of 1907.) Māyūram, Mayuram Taluk, Tanjavur District Pañchanadēśvara temple—on the same wall Kōnēriṉmaikoṇḍāṉ: year 31

summary.p: This is the royal order issued to the authorities of the temple of Tiruvaiyāṟuḍaiyār at Kulōttuṅgaśōḻaṉ-Kuṟṟālam in Tiruvaḻundūr-nāḍu a division of Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-vaḷanāḍu naming the tax free grant mentioned in No. 374 above, viz. 4(1/4) vēli and odd of garden land at Vīrarājēndra-chaturvēdimaṅgalam yielding an annual rent of 60 kalam of paddy per vēli, and 6(1/2) kāśu in addition by way of income from the areca-nut palms for the requirements of daily worship etc., to the deity, as an equivalent of 200 kalam of paddy per year which had been presented by the king in his 29th year.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tribhuvanacakravatti
koṉeriṉmai koṇṭāṉ jayaṅ
koṇṭacoḻavaḷanāṭṭu tiruvaḻuntū
rnāṭṭu kulottuṅkacoḻaṉ kuṟṟāla
ttu tiruvaiyāṟuṭaiyār koyilil
tevarkaṉmikkum śrīmāheśvarak
kaṇkāṇi ceyvārkaḷukkum śrīkā
riyañ ceyvāṉukkum Ittevark
ku veṇṭum nivantaṅkaḷukku Iṟuppatā
ka Ittevar tirunāmattukkāṇiyāṉa ni
lattut tevatāṉa Iṟaiyili Iṭṭa Irupa
ttoṉpatāvatu nām nirvārtta nellu
Irunūṟṟuk kalattukku Iṭaveṇṭum ni
lattukku Innāṭṭu virarāceṉtiraccaruppe
timaṅkalattu tirunāmattuk kāṇiyāy
mānilai tirunantavaṉamākac ceyta nilattukku
Ūrkkaṇakkuc coḻamātevi Uṭaiyāṉ E
ḻuttiṭṭa kaṇakkuppaṭi taram peṟṟa nilam nāle
Orumāmuntirikaik kiḻkkālum taramili nila
ttu ḷḷa vakaikkuṟainta nilattum ye
ṟṟam nālumāvaraik kāṇikkiḻ mukkāle
Oru māvum Āka nilam nālekāle kāṇikkiḻ Oru
māvum muṉ Iṟaikaṭṭiṉapaṭi taviṉtu muppat
toṉṟāvatu pacāṉa mutal Antarāyam pāṭ
ṭam Uṭpaṭat tevatāṉa Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭ
ṭum Innilattukkuk kāṇikkaṭaṉ veli Oṉṟu
kku nellu nūṟṟukkalattiṉāṟ pattāṟākki Aṟu
patiṉ kalamāka Iṟaikaṭṭiyum Innilattukku Iṟut
tu varukiṟa nellukku mel Eṟṟamākak kamukukku I
ṟukkum kācu Āṟaraiyum nivaṉtattukku Uṭalāka
vum kaṭavatāka variyilārum varikku kūṟu cevvā
rkaḷum Eḻuttiṭṭa Uḷvari taraccoṉṉom In
nilam muppattoṉṟāvatu pacāṉamutal Antarā
yam pāṭṭam Uṭpaṭa Ittevaṟku tevatāṉa I
ṟaiyiliyākak kaikkoṇṭu nivaṉtañ celu
ttappaṇṇuka Eḻutiṉāṉ tirumaṉtiraolai rājanārā
yaṇamuventaveḷāṉ Ivai pallavarāyaṉ ṉe
ḻuttu Ivai viḻiñattaraiya ṉeḻuttu Ivai
toṇṭaimāṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai vaāṇattarai
yaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai cittinātaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
vāṇātarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai ciṅkaḷa rāyaṉṉe
ḻuttu Ivai kāṭavarāyaṉ Eḻuttu Ivai
muveṉtaraiyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai cetiku
larāyaṉ ṉeḻuttu Ivai Aṅkarāyaṉ Eḻuttu yā
ṇṭu muppattiraṇṭāvatu nāḷ 100 4 10 7ṉāl .
Digital edition of SII 23.375 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
